spec_match.rationale: The page still covers the three core migration patterns and now executes each one with real data: URL and Blob URL workers.

interactive.rationale: Each pattern card has a Run live comparison control that creates the described workers and writes observed results to an in-page console.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The feature index now describes the live data: URL versus Blob URL migration runners alongside the before/after code.

edge_cases.rationale: The live runners surface current-browser legacy behavior, Chrome 150 opaque-origin expectations, worker timeouts, worker construction errors, and importScripts or IndexedDB failures.

references.rationale: The page cites the official ChromeStatus entry link correctly.

design_system.rationale: The new controls use shared CSS variables, paired button colors, responsive output panels, and textContent rendering for live worker output.

summary: Converted the static migration code cards into a live worker playground: BroadcastChannel, IndexedDB, and importScripts each run data: URL and Blob URL workers and show the observed migration behavior.
